Bash("/c/Users/hp/OneDrive/Desktop/MS/add_preloader.ps1" << 'SCRIPT' $files = @\("about.html", "academics.html", "admissions.html", "events.html", "gallery.html", "teachers.html", "contact.html"\) $basePath = "C:\\Users\\hp\\OneDrive\\Desktop\\MS" $replacement = @"
Modern School
"@ foreach \($file in $files\) { $path = Join-Path $basePath $file if \(Test-Path $path\) { $content = Get-Content $path -Raw $content = $content.Replace\('', $replacement\) Set-Content $path $content -NoNewline Write-Host "Updated: $file" } else { Write-Host "Not found: $file" } } SCRIPT)
